# Data Model Checklist: Toggle Open-Data Layers in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover toggles, bounds, and layer warnings.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/025-open-data-layers/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-002 Map bounds capture bbox and zoom for layer requests.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Layer data responses capture features and coverage status.

## UI State
